TUCKER ALPHA HYBRID WATER FED BRUSH - BOAR AND NYLON BRISTLE - DUAL TRIM - 4 PENCIL JETSThe Tucker Alpha Hybrid Water Fed Brush is the ultimate commercial window cleaning brush.  You won’t find another brush of this quality, with this many features at this price point any where else.
This hybrid WaterFed brush is built around our dual trim, 4 pencil jet brush but is fitted with Nylon bristles on the longer, outer trim and high-quality Boar bristle on the shorter, inner trim.  This allows you to take advantage of the strengths of both materials.  The nylon monofilament can be laid down, allowing it to glide effortlessly over the glass, while it’s horizontally splayed bristles clean deeply into the inner edges and crevices of the window trim. Meanwhile, the shorter boar bristles remain upright in a tip to glass position, allowing their superior natural fiber to scrub away caked on dirt.
It includes an over the top rinse bar as well as our swiveling gooseneck.  This setup allows complete flexibility in cleaning to your specific style. You can choose to rinse directly through the 4 internal pencil jets, the over the top rinse bar, or using a Y-adapter you can use both at once.  The swiveling gooseneck allows the experienced professional to rock the brush back and forth on the surface of the window, while maintaining contact and rinse power.
Note: The rinse bar is not typically intended to be run simultaneously with the brush jets. To do this, you would need to attach an additional 5/16" Y Fitting and a few inches of standard 5/16" OD Pole Tubing. A kit for this is available HERE.

Oil-Flo Safety Solvent Cleaner is a specialized product for removing organic stains such as asphalt, tar, coal, grease and oil. Oil-Flo is biodegradable, water soluble and contains no harmful ingredients or chlorinated fluorocarbons. Oil-Flo bonds to the petrochemical, whatever it may be, and then bonds to the oxygen molecules present in water. This two-step process allows a final rinse with plain water that leaves no residue behind. Neutral pH means Oil-Flo won’t harm the surface, only dissolve the stain. Oil-Flo is our most aggressive cleaner.

Oil-Flo is ideal for cleanup of problems caused by overspray, tracking, spills, line breaks, and any time you have a stain and you want it removed quickly and safely.

Bleach Magic is an all-purpose alkaline cleaner designed for use on all common residential and commercial finishes including: fabric awnings, patio furniture, roofing materials, siding, wood, decking materials, and pavers. Bleach Magic is a brushless cleaner and works phenomenally in tandem with Heritage Restorer. Bleach Magic works equally well in hot or cold temperatures but should not exceed 120° Fahrenheit. Testing should occur before use on all substrates
Dilutions:

Undiluted for extreme stains and soils
4 parts water: 1 part product for heavy stains and soils. Downstream injector from EaCo Chem is designed to dilute at a 4:1 ratio.
Dilute as testing indicates  
Application Instructions:

Pre-wet the surface (do not saturate) with water before applying Bleach Magic. Apply two applications using a low-pressure applicator. Do not rinse between applications.
Rinsing:
Use a wide-angle nozzle when rinsing. Pressures that mark or damage the surface should be avoided.

Applying Sweep Away Oil Stain Absorber

Sweep Away Oil Stain Absorber is a unique, granular product designed to draw out and absorb lingering oil from concrete surfaces. Its advanced formula is non-toxic, eco-friendly, and fast-acting, making it an ideal choice for homeowners and professionals alike. Here's how to utilize this powerful product for maximum effectiveness:


Applying Sweep Away Oil Stain Absorber
1. Sprinkle the absorber: Spread a generous layer of Sweep Away Oil Stain Absorber over the entire stain. (When using with Sweep Away Spray Oil Stain Degreaser; quickly apply Sweep Away Oil Stain Absorber after scrubbing before degreaser drys.
2. Let it work: Allow the absorber to sit on the stain for a minimum of 60 seconds.
3. Sweep it up: Once the absorber has done its job, use a broom or brush to sweep up the granules.
4. Dispose of responsibly: Collect the used absorber and dispose of it according to local regulations.

Applying Sweep Away Oil Stain Absorber

4. Dispose of responsibly: Collect the used absorber and dispose of it according to local regulations.

How to Apply Sweep Away Oil Stain Degreaser

Sweep Away Oil Stain Degreaser is a powerful, professional-grade cleaning solution designed specifically to break down and dissolve oil stains on concrete surfaces. Its unique formula works by penetrating deep into the porous concrete material, lifting away grime, dirt, and engine oil residue. Here's how to use it effectively:

How to Apply Sweep Away Oil Stain Degreaser
1. Clear the area: Remove any debris, loose dirt, and dust from the stained surface.
2. Apply the degreaser: Liberally spray Sweep Away Spray Oil Stain Degreaser directly onto the stain, ensuring full coverage.
3. Scrub the stain: Using a stiff-bristle brush, scrub the stain vigorously in a circular motion.
